A [[Yuuzhan Vong]] '''warrior''' served as the chief [[Battle Tactician|battle tactician]] to [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]] in the prelude to the [[Defense of Mon Calamari (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Defense of Mon Calamari]]. He was concerned about their campaigns in the [[Imperial Remnant]] and the [[Farlax sector/Legends|Farlax sector]], believing they could have used the Imperials and the [[Yevetha]] to good use. When [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] arrived at the [[Coruscant system/Legends|Coruscant system]], the tactician expressed doubt over whether or not it was the Living World of Yuuzhan Vong legend, believing it to be some sort of fabrication by the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]. When Choka ordered the Yuuzhan Vong to either stand down or kill themselves after the death of [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] during the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]], the tactician opted [[Death/Legends|suicide]], slicing himself open with his [[coufee]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
